summary: Tested isAdmin bug fix and room roles system for Koora Voice app. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Room page loads without errors, 'صعود للمنصة' (Join Stage) button works, settings menu opens correctly.

backend_apis: GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/roles - Returns owner and roles list - 200 OK
GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/user-role/{user_id} - Returns user's room role and can_join_stage_direct - 200 OK
GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/participants - Returns participants with room_role field - 200 OK
GET /api/rooms/{room_id} - Returns room info with owner_id - 200 OK
GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/seats - Returns seats and total_seats - 200 OK
POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/seat/join-direct - Owner can join stage directly - 200 OK
frontend_features: Room /room/3977f7ae loads without errors (isAdmin bug FIXED)
'صعود للمنصة' (Join Stage) button visible and functional
Settings menu opens with all options (Watch Party, Poll, Recording, etc.)

bug_fix_verified.issue: isAdmin is not defined error causing React crash
bug_fix_verified.fix: Changed isAdmin to isRoomAdmin at line 140-145 in RoomPage.js
bug_fix_verified.verification: Playwright test confirmed room page loads and all features work

critical_code_review_comments: isRoomAdmin properly defined at line 140: const isRoomAdmin = roomRole === 'admin' || isOwner
canJoinStageDirect properly defined at line 145: const canJoinStageDirect = isOwner || roomRole === 'admin' || roomRole === 'mod'
Room roles API endpoints at lines 1384-1460 in server.py working correctly
Room-specific roles stored in room_roles MongoDB collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Room roles system tested: 1) GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/roles returns owner info and roles list. 2) GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/user-role/{user_id} returns role and can_join_stage_direct boolean. 3) isAdmin bug was fixed by changing to isRoomAdmin. 4) Admin/Mod can join stage directly without request. 5) Room page loads correctly with Agora WebRTC connection.
